arts.ttl: Issame Charaï on what Rangers are doing to compete with Celtic in transfer market – Strategy paying off
arts.sum: Rangers will host Fenerbahçe in the Europa League on Thursday before facing Celtic at the weekend. Barry Ferguson’s side have an advantage against the Turkish club after they secured a 3-1 win in the first leg in Istanbul. They are looking to secure results over both Fenerbahçe and Celtic in the next few days. arts.ttl: Initial offer being prepared for Rangers player – Concern proposal could ‘fall short’
arts.sum: In the summer, Rangers signed Hamza Igamane from Morrocan side AS FAR and gave him a contract until 2029. The striker has enjoyed a good first season at Ibrox so far, managing 13 goals and three assists from 35 games. His form for Rangers has seen him attract interest from other clubs. arts.ttl: “Shock for me” – Issame Charaï on Phillippe Clement exit, and what Rangers have told him
arts.sum: Rangers assistant manager Issame Charaï has told Gazet van Antwerpen that Phillippe Clement’s exit from Ibrox came as a “shock” to him. On January 29th, the Scottish club appointed Charaï as assistant manager and less than a month later, they sacked Clement.
